description: Create or refresh a MassBattle unit from a purchased skeletal mesh through the MassBattleTools DoAll-equivalent editor pipeline.

input_schema.template_unit: Existing UMassBattleAgentConfigDataAsset used as the base unit. Optional when the selected style has default_unit_template/default_unit_templates; the plan returns a warning when it defaults this.
input_schema.unit_name: Stable unit name used for generated asset names.
input_schema.family: Optional organization family from the style profile.
input_schema.animation_search_path: Path used by FindAndFillAnimSequences. Defaults to the source mesh package path when omitted.
input_schema.animation_name_filter: Optional name filter for FindAndFillAnimSequences. When omitted, MCP uses an empty filter to include all same-skeleton animations in the search path and returns a warning.
input_schema.animations: Optional explicit animation category map such as {"idle": [AnimPath], "appear": [AnimPath], "death": [AnimPath]}; mirrors filling the MassBattleTools animation arrays before DoAll. If automatic categorization finds no named states, MCP falls back to same-skeleton AnimSequences and warns that this map should be supplied.
input_schema.vat_sample_rate: VAT sampling rate. Defaults to 24 for MCP-generated VAT units. Source animation frame counts are resampled to this rate before baking, and rates above the source key rate are rejected instead of truncating playback; runtime can still interpolate.
input_schema.vat_uv_channel: StaticMesh UV channel used by AnimToTexture. Defaults to 1.
input_schema.parent_material: Optional parent material for generated material instances. Defaults to the style default or /MassBattle/Core/AgentRenderer/VAT/M_VATMaster.
input_schema.material_overrides: Optional array of material paths or {slot_index, slot_name, slot_name_contains, material} objects applied to the generated StaticMesh after material instance generation.
input_schema.source_renderer_class: Renderer Blueprint generated class used as the template when duplicating a renderer. Defaults to the MassBattle AgentRenderer template.
input_schema.niagara_system: Optional Niagara system assigned to the renderer defaults. Defaults to the MassBattle AgentRenderer template Niagara system.
input_schema.unit_patch: Union-merge patch applied to the cloned or target unit DataAsset.
input_schema.target_package_path: Optional override for the generated content package path.
input_schema.target_unit_package_path: Optional override for the generated unit DataAsset package path.
input_schema.output_root: Optional override for generated content root.

pipeline_note: These are internal DoAll stages for diagnostics. Normal AI authoring should call the apply entry once and inspect warnings.

pipeline.description: Resolve output folders and naming from the selected unit management style.
Find source textures from the purchased skeletal mesh material slots.
Find animation sequences that share the mesh skeleton; if name-based categorization is empty, fall back to compatible AnimSequences and return warnings for explicit state mapping.
Convert the skeletal mesh to MassBattle static mesh LODs.
Create material instances for generated static mesh LODs.
Override generated StaticMesh material slots with explicit materials when a skin package should replace the source mesh materials.
Create or reuse the AnimToTexture DataAsset and HDR VAT texture assets exactly like the MassBattleTools DoAll flow.
Bake the filled animation arrays into VAT textures at the configured sample rate.
Apply baked texture parameters, AnimDataTex, and MassBattle VAT static switches to generated material instances.
Convert found animation sequences into FAnimsData for AnimShared.
Union-merge generated Visualize, LODShared, AnimShared, and balance defaults into the target unit.
